login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Access your ElectroCorp dashboard to manage devices, routines and energy usage.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create your ElectroCorp account to start managing smart energy devices.

home.title: Welcome to ElectroCorp
home.content: Manage your smart devices, monitor energy consumption, review alerts and control your subscription from one place.
home.devicesActionDescription: Turn on, turn off and manage your smart equipment.
home.energyActionDescription: Check energy consumption metrics and charts.
home.historyActionDescription: Review registered readings and export reports.

about.title: About ElectroCorp
about.content: ElectroCorp is a smart platform for monitoring energy consumption, managing devices, configuring routines and receiving alerts.

devices.title: Smart device control
devices.subtitle: Manage smart plugs, switches and lights from one centralized view.
devices.name: Name
devices.emptyContent: Add your first smart plug, switch or light to get started.

energy.title: Energy consumption monitoring
energy.subtitle: View device consumption, filter history and export your readings for analysis.

routines.title: Scheduled routines
routines.subtitle: Schedule actions to turn smart devices on or off at defined times.
routines.name: Name
routines.emptyContent: Create routines to turn devices on or off automatically.

energyHistory.title: Consumption history
energyHistory.subtitle: Review registered readings, detect consumption peaks and export information for reports.

billing.title: Service plans
billing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your home, business or multiple locations. There is no free plan; all plans are designed for real operation.

notifications.title: Alerts center
notifications.subtitle: Review high-consumption alerts, monthly reports and automatic recommendations.
notifications.emptyContent: When the system detects important events, they will appear here.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.content: The route you entered does not exist.
